title: harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. zeyheri
intro: Harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. zeyheri, also known as Devil's Claw, is a perennial succulent plant native to southern Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Harpagophytum zeyheri subsp. zeyheri include reducing joint pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Devil's Claw can be found in capsule, tablet, or liquid forms, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
